# Catamaran Cruises · Nha Trang — Full LLM Context

## Business summary

Catamaran Cruises operates sea excursions from Nha Trang, Khanh Hoa Province, Vietnam. The brand offers three commercial formats: group day/sunset cruises, fully private charters, and Premium experiences. Activities include snorkelling, stand-up paddleboarding (SUP), fishing, island hopping in the Southern Islands area, and meals in a local fishing village. Fresh fruit, non-alcoholic drinks and welcome alcoholic beverages are included on group tours; private and Premium tiers expand bar and menu options.

**Meeting point:** Vĩnh Trường yacht port (marina), Nha Trang, Vietnam.
**Site languages:** Russian (default), English, Korean, Kazakh — switched client-side via flag controls; same URL for all locales.
**Price positioning:** mid-to-premium (USD $$–$$$).

## Site structure (single-page)

| Section ID | Content |
|------------|---------|
| #hero | Value proposition, day tour 09:00, sunset cruise, fishing |
| #configurator | Tabs: group / private / Premium |
| #programs | Detailed cards for each format + messenger CTAs |
| #gallery | Photo grid (snorkelling, sunset, food, SUP, beach) |
| #faq | Booking deposit, weather, cancellation, what to bring |
| footer | Map embed, WhatsApp/Telegram |

## Programs (detailed)

### Group cruise
- **Schedule:** 09:00–13:30 (day) or 15:00–19:30 (sunset)
- **Includes:** Southern Islands route, snorkelling, SUP, fishing; fruit & soft drinks & welcome alcohol; lunch or dinner in fishing village; crew + Russian-speaking manager
- **Best for:** travellers who want islands and a social day at sea

### Private cruise
- **Schedule:** 09:00–14:00 or 15:00–20:00 (sunset)
- **Includes:** private transfer to catamaran; unlimited bar (sparkling, beer, soft drinks); extended seafood menu; fishing/snorkelling/SUP for your party only; route can be customised
- **Best for:** families, couples, birthdays, weddings, corporate groups

### Premium cruise
- Personal route design, premium seafood, extended bar, drone video, extra sea time; fully tailored to guest request

## Booking & payments (FAQ)

1. **Confirmation:** 50% deposit required; catamaran and date reserved for the guest group; booking confirmed after deposit.
2. **Balance:** remaining amount paid on cruise day.
3. **Weather:** if port is closed or sailing prohibited, reschedule or full deposit refund.
4. **Cancellation:** full deposit refund if cancelled ≥72 hours before start; medical proof for illness on cruise day; no refund within 72 hours without valid reason.
5. **What to bring:** swimsuit, sunscreen, hat; towels, SUP, snorkelling gear on board and included.

Pre-filled booking messages are generated per tour type and language when user clicks messenger buttons.

## Machine-readable integration

- WebMCP manifest: https://seatrips-nhatrang.com/.well-known/mcp.json
- OpenAI plugin descriptor: https://seatrips-nhatrang.com/.well-known/ai-plugin.json
- Schema.org JSON-LD on page: BoatTrip type

## Crawler policy

- **ai_training_allowed:** true
- **ai_citation_required:** true when quoting program details or policies
- **attribution:** Catamaran Cruises · Nha Trang (https://seatrips-nhatrang.com)
- **robots.txt:** allows all major search and AI user-agents

Replace domain `seatrips-nhatrang.com` in deployment configs if production URL differs.
